body.notes: Spun out from GH-255 close 2026-04-19. The tiered_research() tool is already live (graph → web search → local LLM → cloud LLM synthesis, commit 119710ef). What remains is the habit-level automation: seed a PROCEDURAL habit (PROC_TIERED_RESEARCH) that matches question-shaped inputs, fires tiered_research, and deposits the synthesis back into the cortex as FACTUAL memories so future graph searches pick them up without re-invoking the tool. Related: watchlist habits pattern (GH-299 territory) is the template. Scope: small — one seeder script + one habit node + deposit wrapper.
body.title: PROC_TIERED_RESEARCH habit — fire tiered_research on question-shape triggers + deposit
body.result: Shipped ac6fea45. research_and_deposit(query) wrapper + PROC_TIERED_RESEARCH habit seeded (id in DB). Habit auto-dispatches on 'research X' / 'look up X' / 'tell me about X' etc., runs tiered_research (memory→web→local→cloud), deposits Q/A as FACTUAL memory with tags=research,tiered_research. Picks up after next Igor restart (habit table re-read at boot).
